facts.summary: Five custom agents: doc-discoverer.md, doc-architect.md, doc-planner.md, doc-writer.md, doc-auditor.md.

Roles per README: doc-discoverer (source->evidence), doc-architect (evidence->model), doc-planner (model->plan/manifest), doc-writer (one bounded page per run), doc-auditor (claims->evidence verification).
Detailed agent prompt bodies were not read; only filenames and README role summaries are confirmed.
